title: Regolamenti dwar Dispensers tal-Ajrusol
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/427.26/mlt, expression eli/sl/427.26/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
DISPENSERS TA’ AJRUSOL

[L.S.427.26

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 427.26
REGOLAMENTI DWAR DISPENSERS
TA’ L-AJRUSOL*
1 ta’ Lulju, 2002
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 145 tal-2002, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 26 tal2009, 94 tal-2011, 395 tal-2013 u 93 tal-2017.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
